    • from

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder from(UpdateScoreConfigRequest other)

    • isArchived

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder isArchived(Optional<Boolean> isArchived)

      The status of the score config showing if it is archived or not

    • isArchived

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder isArchived(Boolean isArchived)

    • name

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder name(Optional<String> name)

      The name of the score config

    • name

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder name(String name)

    • categories

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder categories(Optional<List<ConfigCategory>> categories)

      Configure custom categories for categorical scores. Pass a list of objects with label and value properties. Categories are autogenerated for boolean configs and cannot be passed

    • categories

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder categories(List<ConfigCategory> categories)

    • minValue

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder minValue(Optional<Double> minValue)

      Configure a minimum value for numerical scores. If not set, the minimum value defaults to -∞

    • minValue

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder minValue(Double minValue)

    • maxValue

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder maxValue(Optional<Double> maxValue)

      Configure a maximum value for numerical scores. If not set, the maximum value defaults to +∞

    • maxValue

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder maxValue(Double maxValue)

    • description

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder description(Optional<String> description)

      Description is shown across the Langfuse UI and can be used to e.g. explain the config categories in detail, why a numeric range was set, or provide additional context on config name or usage

    • description

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest.Builder description(String description)

    • build

      public UpdateScoreConfigRequest build()
